arts.ttl: Chris Wilder will be fuming if £5m “Mickey Mouse” Leeds United ace continues fine form tonight
arts.sum: Leeds United signed Jayden Bogle from Sheffield United during the summer, and Chris Wilder was not happy about how the Whites handled the deal. Leeds welcome Sheffield United to Elland Road tonight in an early-season clash between two of the most heavily-fancied sides for the league title.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United boss Chris Wilder addresses “muppets” dig at Leeds United’s Patrick Bamford
arts.sum: In turn, the Blades manager had clearly been bottling up emotion following comments made by Adam Forshaw and Patrick Bamford previously in that season, as he said this to their club site (via talkSPORT ): Leeds United host Sheffield United this evening with Chris Wilder one of the main antagonists at Elland Road during this encounter, thanks to many comments made in recent years.

arts.ttl: Burrows starts: Sheffield United team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United
arts.sum: The latest Sheffield United team news as Chris Wilder's side gear up to face Leeds United in the Championship. The post Burrows starts: Sheffield United team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke’s “best in the league” Leeds United claim may backfire tonight v Sheffield United
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier was dubbed the best in the league by manager Daniel Farke back in August, but a truer contender to that title faces the Whites tonight in Sheffield United’s Michael Cooper. Illan Meslier dubbed best goalkeeper in the Championship by Leeds boss Daniel Farke

arts.ttl: 'Their fans know' Chris Wilder stokes Leeds United rivalry with massive finances claim
arts.sum: Now the manager says Leeds have the biggest budget in the history of the Championship and have to win promotion this season. Wilder has already insisted that Leeds are a "top six club in English football" and one his Sheffield United side cannot compete with.

arts.sum: Leeds United are back in Championship action on Friday evening with a home clash against Sheffield United at… The post Striker decision made: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Sheffield United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Sheffield United after double injury boost
arts.sum: "It’s always tricky during the international break for a team with so many players away," Farke when asked about the injury problems at Elland Road. Normally both teams want to be at their best, Friday evening is a bit disappointing, we know about the schedule list and for that no complaints.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Sheffield United on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United can send a statement to their promotion rivals when they face Sheffield United at Elland Road on Friday night. The match will be broadcast live on the Sky Sports Football channel, with coverage getting underway at 19.30pm.

arts.ttl: Leeds United legends and Leeds Rhinos hero Kevin Sinfield help open new White Rose Shopping Centre store
arts.sum: Leeds Rhinos hero Kevin Sinfield and some former Leeds United stars helped open a new fashion store at the White Rose Shopping Centre. Leading UK menswear brand, Skopes, has opened its flagship store at White Rose Shopping Centre marking a homecoming for the Leeds brand.

arts.ttl: Leeds boss issues emphatic response to surprising Jurgen Klopp link
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke is unconcerned by Jurgen Klopps new role as Red Bull's Head of Soccer and is adamant that his side retain autonomy despite their new investors
